# mieza.meanings

> GPU-accelerated k-means clustering for Clojure. Targets "medium" datasets—too
> large to fit in RAM—using memory-mapped I/O (e.g. Arrow) and optional OpenCL
> distance math. Pluggable distance functions and initialization methods.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/README.md): install, quick start
- [API guide](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/doc/intro.md): formats, distances, inits, options
- [Agent / contributor guide](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/AGENTS.md): build, layout, boundaries
- [Changelog](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): releases
- [API reference (cljdoc)](https://cljdoc.org/d/ai.mieza/mieza.meanings): generated docs once published

## Core API

- [k-means multimethod](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/kmeans.clj): file path or lazy dataset seq → `ClusterResult`
- [k-means-seq](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/kmeans.clj): lazy seq of repeated runs (pick lowest `:cost`)
- [Savable — save-model](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/protocols/savable.clj): persist `ClusterResult`
- [load-model](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/records/cluster_result.clj): reload `ClusterResult`
- [Classifier — assignments](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/protocols/classifier.clj): batch assign new chunks to clusters

## Optional depth

- [Distances](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/distances.clj): `:distance-key`, GPU-capable subset
- [Initializations](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/initializations/core.clj): `:init` multimethod
- [Persistence formats](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/src/clj/mieza/meanings/persistence.clj): `:arrow`, `:csv`, `:parquet`, `:arrows`
- [Security policy](https://github.com/tacktechai/mieza.meanings/blob/main/SECURITY.md)

## Full inline reference

For a single-file context without following links, see `llms-full.txt` in this repository.
